description_long: This is a medium-sized, flexible black plastic bucket with a slightly irregular, soft-edged square opening and a gently tapering body. The rim is uneven and appears to have a thin, rolled lip, with one corner showing a pronounced fold or crease, suggesting the material is pliable. The surface is matte with subtle textural variations, and the bucket lacks any visible handles, reinforcements, or decorative features. The interior is visible from the top, showing a smooth, continuous surface with no internal divisions. The bucket sits on a textured, possibly concrete or asphalt surface, indicating it is designed for utilitarian use. There are no visible labels, markings, or branding on the exterior.
description: A flexible, black plastic bucket with a square, uneven rim and a plain, matte surface. It has no handles or markings and appears suitable for general utility use.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bucket's uneven rim with a pronounced fold on the right corner and a slightly bulging side.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the bucket's tapering profile and the smooth, uninterrupted surface with a visible rim fold.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the bucket's broad, plain back with a consistent matte finish and no visible features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals another angle of the rim's irregularity and the bucket's overall soft, flexible form.
